features: 🌍 ENVIRONMENT FRIENDLY: Unlike other brand’s cotton buds, these bamboo cotton swabs are totally eco-friendly with plastic-free wrapping and are biodegradable.

🌍 DESIGN & QUALITY: Your new cotton ear buds are made of pure cotton and bamboo while cautiously packed in six small boxes which are prepared from cardboard; thus, they are odorless, and defensible. The dual cotton tips are soft, compressed and durably fixed to a wooden stick that is resilient enough to hold and wipe.

🌍 COST EFFECTIVE VALUE PACK: The suite includes 600 ear cotton swabs. They are not only easy for entrée and convenient for storing due to the packaging, but also certainly can be used for an entire family for months and consequently save your money due to the capacity.

🌍 MULTI-FUNCTIONAL: These biodegradable cotton wool buds can be extensively used at home such as drying and cleaning ears after bath, after using cosmetics, unrelenting wound and so on. They are absolutely a must in our daily life.

🌍 ORGANIC COTTON: Our Bamboo Cotton buds are twirled with the uppermost quality premium cotton. We're proud to employ unbleached cotton on our swabs hence providing the densest, penetrable, and lengthiest lasting cotton wool buds accessible.
description: Product Description BAMBOO COTTON SWABS Why Bamboo Cotton Buds? Bamboo is a remarkable plant with sustainable product characteristics: Bamboo is amongst the fastest growing plant that can grow up to 4cm in an hour Bamboo has a higher flexible strength than wood It is perfectly safe for Humans and Pets Bamboo Plants can grow with any use of pesticides Bamboo plant fibers are odour resistant BAMBOO COTTON BUDS WITH VARIETY OF APPLICATIONS Great for Laptop Cleaning Suitable For Adults, Children and Pets Adjusting or Removing Makeup 600 Eco Origin Bamboo Cotton Buds COTTON BUDS VALUE PACK A reusable everyday product made from organic plant-based materials, and abandoning traditional plastic swabs to make a small contribution to beautiful nature. One-Pack for the Whole Family: The package contains 6 small packs of 100 cotton buds each, which is not only convenient in use but makes storage easier too. The Supply Republic is a small, family-owned business from the UK that is striving for creating naturally sustainable products in the market to make this planet a happy place for future generations. Sustainable alternative to plastic buds! Plant-based Materials Durable and Stronger Bamboo Wood and Good Quality Cotton Ear swabs from The Supply Republic are made of maintainable materials. They are a flawless substitute to plastic tips since they will not contaminate the world. They are well made for daily use and carefully packed in small boxes which are easy to access and convenient for storage at home: Pure Organic Cotton Lint Free Soft, Mild, and Permeable Soft yet long-lasting design Made without chlorine bleaching and cologne Package Contains: 100 Sticks X 6 Box 600 Sticks Wood Earbuds In Total 3 Layers 22 Pack Reusable Make up Remover Pads Wheatstraw Disposable Razors - 10 Pack Bamboo Toothbrush with Medium Bristles White Wheatstraw Dermaplane Tool - 3 Pack Pink Wheatstraw Dermaplane Razor - 3 Pack Laundry Detergent Sheet Strips Add To Basket Buying Options Add To Basket Buying Options Buying Options Buying Options Customer Reviews 4.4 out of 5 stars 156 3.8 out of 5 stars 75 4.4 out of 5 stars 32 4.4 out of 5 stars 63 4.4 out of 5 stars 63 4.3 out of 5 stars 98 Price £6.99 £ 6 . 99 — no data £7.49 £ 7 . 49 — no data — no data — no data Colour Red & Black Natural White White Pink White Quantity 22 10 5 3 3 64 Loads Material Bamboo & Cotton Wheatstraw Bamboo Wheatstraw Wheatstraw Plant based
